title: Structured JSON Output for Movie Database
scenario: Write a Python script that generates a structured JSON output for a movie database. The output should contain the movie title, release year, director, and genres. The input will be a list of dictionaries containing movie information. The JSON output should be sorted by release year in descending order.
constraints: Must be a single JSON object
Must include the required movie information fields

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the JSON output is syntactically valid.
Check if the JSON output accurately represents the input data.
Check if the JSON output is sorted by release year in descending order.
